'''Voba Dokrett''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and the [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of the ''[[Gorath]]'' and a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]].

==Biography==
He and his crew on the ''Gorath'' were [[Death/Legends|killed]] when they tried to capture the ''[[Teljkon Vagabond]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
